commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They shall come, and shall declare his righteousness unto a people that shall be born, that he has done this. Augustine of Hippo 32. "The generation to come shall be declared to the Lord" (ver. The generation of the New Testament shall be declared to the honour of the Lord. "And the heavens shall declare His righteousness. " And the Evangelists shall declare His righteousness. "To a people that shall be born, whom the Lord hath made. " To a people that shall be born to the Lord through faith.
